## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Why this change is needed. Link to issue if applicable: Closes #

## How

Key implementation decisions. Reference any new ADRs if applicable.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests written and passing (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Linting clean (`uv run ruff check src/`)
- [ ] Type check passing (`uv run mypy src/`)
- [ ] Terraform validated (`uv run scripts/tf_validate.py`) — if Terraform changed
- [ ] Architecture diagrams updated — if component relationships changed
- [ ] ADR written — if a significant architectural decision was made
- [ ] Runbook updated — if a new failure mode is introduced
- [ ] `docs/build-plan.md` ticked — if a build step is complete
- [ ] `README.md` updated — if anything in the status table changed
